regions.name: embedded_idc
regions.limitation: FasterCap verification applies only to the embedded IDC extraction region.

regions.name: cpw_launch_and_feed
regions.reason: openEMS executable not found (looked for octave-cli, octave-cli.exe, octave, octave.exe). Install it or pass an explicit path; prepared input files remain available.
regions.limitation: Standalone feed model; it excludes launch pads and the IDC transition.

regions.name: transition_region
regions.limitation: No full-wave transition model was executed.

statement: FasterCap verification applies only to the embedded IDC extraction region. CPW launches, feedlines, and transitions are not full-wave verified unless a whole-structure openEMS execution is available.
